title: December 31
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 31''' is the last day of the calendar year. It is the 365th day (366th in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Julian Stone]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Chris Terrio]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars Insider 41|''Star Wars Insider'' 41]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 59|''Republic'' 59]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 31|''Legacy'' (2006) 31]] published.
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Crash Course]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Jacob Witkin]] dies.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' shorts "[[Sixty Seconds to Destruction]]," "[[Buggle's Day Out]]" and "[[The Rematch]]" are released on YouTube.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Collecting a Galaxy: The Art of Sideshow]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – "[[Zero Friends Again]]" aired on Disney+.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 10 – Phantoms]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The High Republic: Starlight Stories]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*[[2025]] – [[Boba Fett — Black, White & Red 4|''Boba Fett — Black, White & Red'' 4]] published.
*2025 – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents 1|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents'' 1]] published.
<noinclude>
